creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hetzner.com has now a datacenter in Singapore (ap-southeast). If you install FreeBSD packages you will get them from Frankfurt instead the nearby Kuala Lumpur. Ping time to FRA with 160ms is ok, but the 17ms to KUL are much better. Apparently, Hetzner use two class B networks in Singapore: 5.222.0.0 - 5.223.255.255

It would be great if the hetzner VMs gets the pkg from KUL by default.


whois 5.222.0.0

inetnum: 5.222.0.0 - 5.223.255.255

country: SG
org: ORG-HOA1-RIPE

geofeed: https://www.hetzner.com/geofeed.csv

host pkg.freebsd.org
pkg.freebsd.org is an alias for pkgmir.geo.freebsd.org.
pkgmir.geo.freebsd.org has address 147.28.184.43
pkgmir.geo.freebsd.org has IPv6 address 2604:1380:4091:a001::50:2
pkgmir.geo.freebsd.org mail is handled by 0 .
